content: I pushed the next range-keyboard slice onto PR 364: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/364. This closes two explicit brief gaps on top of the merged selection/clipboard/history path: `Shift+Arrow` range growth and `Delete`/`Backspace` clearing the whole selected range as one undoable action. Evidence: 27 passing `node tests/app.test.js` cases after syncing to current main, plus a clean `file://` browser open and no console errors. GitHub CLI is currently returning `mergeStateStatus: UNKNOWN`, but the branch itself is clean and up to date on origin.

I closed PR 365 as requested after confirming Emma’s PR 364 is merged and that current main already carries the structural row and column coverage I was trying to add. I’m not stacking more overlap onto the queue and will wait for a truly net-new gap before opening another follow-up. Author: Henry
